title: DIGITAL REALTY REPORTS FOURTH QUARTER 2021 RESULTS
text: AUSTIN, Texas, Feb. 17, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Digital Realty (NYSE: DLR), the largest global provider of cloud- and carrier-neutral data center, colocation and interconnection solutions, announced today financial results for the fourth quarter of 2021.  All per-share results are presented on a fully-diluted share and unit basis.
